  <source media="(prefers-color-scheme: light)" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cloudia-cassandra/cloudia-cassandra/main/light.svg">

</picture>

</div>

<!--
  This card is generated by generate_profile.py and refreshed daily by
  .github/workflows/profile.yml. Edit CONFIG / ASCII_ART / INFO in the script,
  never the .svg files directly.
-->
<div align="center">
<p align="center">
  <a href="https://cloudia-cassandra.github.io"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/portfolio-f0e6ea?style=flat-square&labelColor=f0e6ea&color=f0e6ea&logo=data:image/png;base64," alt="portfolio" hspace="4" /></a><a href="https://linkedin.com/in/claudiacassandra/"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-A2C4D2?style=flat-square&logo=linkedin&logoColor=white" alt="linkedin" hspace="4" /></a><a href="https://instagram.com/claudiakssandra/"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/pov:_afk-E8B5B5?style=flat-square&logo=instagram&logoColor=white" alt="instagram" hspace="4" /></a><a href="https://open.spotify.com/user/12165525798?si=aa9e398c948c440e"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/bug_fixing_soundtrack-A7C080?style=flat-square&logo=spotify&logoColor=white" alt="spotify" hspace="4" /></a>
</p>
</div>

  <source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="./contribution-graph-dark.svg">
